dimension_checks.base_residual_power: A^2 /(12 pi^2) * fyr^(gamma-3) * f^(-gamma) / Tspan; same convention as existing H4 ceffyl model
dimension_checks.low_frequency_limit: all curvature multipliers suppress or preserve power at f << f_bend/f_e for non-negative shape parameters
dimension_checks.high_frequency_limit: all curvature multipliers approach 1 at f >> f_bend/f_e
